seoTitle: Nelungaloo vs Nemingha — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nelungaloo and Nemingha. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nelungaloo and Nemingha.
heading: Nelungaloo vs Nemingha — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nelungaloo, New South Wales and Nemingha, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nelungaloo has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Nemingha (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nelungaloo or Nemingha safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nelungaloo has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Nemingha scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nelungaloo scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Nemingha scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nelungaloo or Nemingha?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nelungaloo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
